ch1_level2_start.text: The forest thickens as Antakin leads you deeper. A chill settles in, and the shadows stretch unnaturally between the trees. You notice movement—shapes twisted and writhing, corrupted by dark mana.

antakin_level2_instruction.mageText: Here… I’ll stay back for now. Do exactly what you did before. Trust your instincts.

level2_card_choice.text: Two cards float before you, glowing softly. Choose one.

level2_result_1.text: You strike. The first corrupted creature falls. Another appears. You act again. Choose a card.

level2_result_1_1.text: You strike again. And once more, you strike—each blow swift and unerring. Choose a card.

level2_result_1_2.text: The urge to do it again, why it was breathtaking… You use one more card.

antakin_level2_warning.mageText: Okay, i think that's enough... Quite concerning. It might be altering something… in your mind.

response_options.text: A shiver runs down your spine. You scold yourself internally, but… Antakin might be right. Something feels different… heavier.

antakin_softens.mageText: Oh dear, maybe I was a bit impulsive letting you slaughter those creatures...

antakin_concern.mageText: Stubborn, eh? That's not quite what I envisioned... Hmm...

antakin_leads_back.mageText: Come. Let’s return to where you woke up. We need to understand this before we go any further.

ch1_level2_end.text: You follow Antakin back through the shadowed forest. The corrupted shapes fade behind you, leaving only the whisper of mana and the questions you cannot yet answer.
